Auth.termsNotice: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
Auth.heroTagline: Modern project management for engineering teams.
Auth.heroSubtitle: Plan sprints, run boards, and ship faster — all in one place.
Auth.totpPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
Auth.recoveryPrompt: Enter one of your single-use recovery codes.
Auth.oauthErrorInvalidStateBody: The sign-in attempt expired or doesn't match. Please try again from the login page.
Auth.oauthErrorProviderErrorBody: We couldn't reach the sign-in provider. Try again in a moment.
Auth.oauthErrorNoEmailBody: Your account did not return an email address. Make a verified email visible on the provider and try again.
Auth.oauthErrorAccountExistsBody: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with your password — once linking ships, you can connect this provider from settings.
